exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note:
Did 60 lbs 3 xs 10
Felt very strong. Last reps tough but probably could have done 1 more.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Got all 3 sets. Last reps tough

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Got all the sets. Last reps tough. Did 3 xs 10 for all

exercises.name: Shoulder Press (DB)
exercises.note: Got 3 xs 12. Last rep was very tough.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Got all the sets and reps here

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Hammer Curl
exercises.planned: Rope pushdown 77 lb ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В— 12 + Hammer curl 25 lb ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В— 10 ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В· 3 rounds
exercises.note:
The cable machine that I used for the tricep pushdown today actually just went by tens so I either had a 70 or an 80. I started with 12 reps of 70 then I moved to 80. There's a bunch of cable machines in my gym so sometimes I can't use the same one. Went to 80 and got 12 then 10 reps.

Curls did 25lbs xs 10 xs 3. Last rep tough!

exercises.name: Core Circuit: Dead Bug ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Pallof Press ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Bicycle Crunch
exercises.planned: Dead bug ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В— 10/side ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Pallof press 30 lb ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В— 12/side ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚В†ГѓВ‚Г‚В’ Bicycle crunch ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В— 20 ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В· 3 rounds
exercises.note: First set felt easy. Got all the reps on the core circuit and finished with 30 bicycle kicks. I could have probably got 40, but I just didn't want to burn out at that point. I also did not do incline walk at the end because I was already at an hour and five minutes, and it's a Wednesday. I'm OK to go over an hour on the weekends, but during the week I'd like to keep my workouts to about an hour and five minutes tops.

notes: Session felt really strong overall. Hi on Saturdays and Sundays I'm okay doing this type of workout but during the week I think it's a little bit too much because I have to start work and I'm definitely gonna be pretty tired in the morning here. Overall really good.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Got all three sets pretty good, pretty strong, feeling good.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Did 140 pounds times 12 for the first two and then got 14 on the last set. It was tough but probably could have done a couple more honestly.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: Got all these reps. Tough. Legs getting a little tired here.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Got 12 then 10 then 8 I only got eight on the last set because my hamstrings were feeling super tight. I pulled one of my hamstrings like 12 years ago and I still get a little nervous when it gets too tight and I don't want it to pop.

exercises.name: KB Swing (Two-Hand)
exercises.note: My heart rate is definitely up here but the weight did feel a little light. Honestly I felt it in my lower abs and my hips and I think probably a decent weight for this type of exercise but you tell me.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.note: I couldn't find a 45 lb kettlebell so I did a 50 lb kettlebell and felt quite fine doing both reps or both sets of twelve.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.planned: Pallof Press 20 lb ГѓВѓГ‚В— 10/side + Ab Wheel ГѓВѓГ‚В— 8-10 + Bird Dog ГѓВѓГ‚В— 8/side ГѓВ‚Г‚В· 2 rounds
exercises.note: The 20 lb on the pull-off press felt too light so on the second set I bumped it to 30. Still felt very manageable at 30.

notes: The session felt good. I felt pretty strong except for the incline bench. My shoulder is definitely not 100% but honestly it really hasn't been for a very long time. The workout was a little over an hour. It was like an hour and 10 minutes but I don't feel super fried. I think that if I did the 10-minute walk I would have maybe felt fried but I skipped the finisher.

exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: Got all these reps good

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: The cable row machine at my gym goes 120, 135 then 150. I did 135 xs 10 xs 3. Last reps very tough.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench
exercises.note: I put the bench at about 45 degrees. I can only get 8 reps with the 60 lb dumbbells on set one and 6 reps on set two so I dropped the dumbbells to 50 lb for the last set. My left shoulder also started to feel quite tired just right away on the first set. I got 10 on the last set but barely.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: The lat pull down at the gym was taken so I switched to dumbbell rows with a 45 lb dumbbell. First set I did 12 reps. Got 12 on set 2 and 3rd set also.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.note: I did 10 lb dumbbells instead of 15. My shoulder's feeling quite weak. I did get 20 reps on the first set though. It's pinching a bit but I think I can push through it here. 15 reps on set 2. Got 18 reps on the last set. The shoulder didn't feel any more pain than it felt on the first set so I kept going and felt pretty good.

exercises.name: Arms Superset ГўВЂВ” Hammer Curl + Rope Pushdown
exercises.planned: Hammer Curl 25 lb ГѓВ— 12 + Rope Pushdown 77 lb ГѓВ— 12 Г‚В· 3 rounds
exercises.note: For the curls I got 12 reps on set one and 10 reps on set two. I think my biceps are a little tired from the switch-up to the dumbbell rows. The machine that I was using for the rope pushdown goes by tens so it was either 70 or 80 so I chose 80. I got 12 reps on the first set and 10 reps on the second. Got 10 reps on curls for last set and 12 reps on pushdown.

exercises.name: Core Circuit
exercises.planned: Dead Bugs x 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Pallof Press 20 lb x 10/side Г‚В· 2 rounds
exercises.note: I did 30kb pallof press. Core Circuit felt easy

notes: Session felt good. It didn't feel like it was a break but I don't feel burnt out.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Step-Ups
exercises.note: I did one leg at a time here and when I lifted my leg that I wasn't using, I drove it all the way up and crunched a little bit at the top for a little extra.

exercises.name: Core Circuit
exercises.planned: Dead Bugs Г— 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Pallof Press 20 lb Г— 10/side В· 2 rounds
exercises.note: I bumped up to 40 lb on the pull-up bar because I felt like 20 and 30 lb is too light. I think 40 lb is a good weight for me with that exercise right now.
